name: app-gtm-release-toolkit
description: Multi-platform app go-to-market toolkit — ship Flutter, KMP, Swift, .NET MAUI, and PWAs to Google Play, App Store, Microsoft Store, Snap Store, and alternative channels. Three-tier architecture: strategic advisor + per-framework ship commands + mass publish.

plugins.name: app-gtm-release
plugins.description: Guided multi-platform app release lifecycle. Three-tier command architecture: /ship-advisor (strategic router), per-framework execution (/ship-flutter today; /ship-pwa, /ship-snap, /ship-msstore, /ship-kmp, /ship-maui, /ship-swift in roadmap), and /ship-everywhere (Phase 1 mass-publish). 9 commands, 10 skills (6 framework-agnostic, 4 Flutter-coupled with TODO markers), 2 agents. Covers Codemagic/GitHub Actions CI/CD, Google Play + App Store + Microsoft Store + Snap Store setup, RevenueCat monetization, Shorebird code push (Flutter), and pre-launch checklist based on Andrea Bizzotto's methodology.
